name: Spaghetti Al Tonno
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add chopped green pepper and onion; sauté until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in tuna fish, tomato sauce, water, salt, oregano, garlic powder, and pepper.
4. Cook the mixture until thoroughly heated, stirring occasionally, for 5-10 minutes.
5. Pour the sauce over cooked spaghetti.
6. If desired, sprinkle with grated cheese before serving.
